Strixhaven Initiate.source: Automatically gained via a Strixhaven College Background.[cite: 8]
Strixhaven Initiate.cantrips: You learn two cantrips from the spell list associated with your chosen college.[cite: 8]
Strixhaven Initiate.spells: You learn one 1st-level spell from your college’s list. You can cast it once without a spell slot per long rest, or use available spell slots to cast it.[cite: 8]
Strixhaven Initiate.spellcastingAbility: You choose Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma as your spellcasting ability for these spells.[cite: 8]

Strixhaven Mascot.summoning: You can cast the Find Familiar spell to summon a mascot associated with your college: a Spirit Statue (Lorehold), Art Elemental (Prismari), Fractal (Quandrix), Inkling (Silverquill), or Pest (Witherbloom).[cite: 8]
Strixhaven Mascot.tacticalTeleport: As a bonus action, you can teleport to swap places with your mascot if it is within 60 feet.[cite: 8]
Strixhaven Mascot.attackAction: When you take the Attack action, you can forgo one of your attacks to allow your mascot to use its reaction to make one attack.[cite: 8]
